llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 4.4.1 (Recognition of Cecilia I. Márquez) was pulled from the agenda before approval. The meeting proceeded to item 5.1 (Board Officer's Rotation). Item 4 (Welcome by School Board President) was not formally presented as Cecilia Marquez was absent and out sick.
